'''Matanya B''' was one of two [[Star/Legends|stars]] of the [[Belgaroth system/Legends|Belgaroth system]]. It was yellow star. It set over [[Belgaroth]] 15 minutes before its companion [[Matanya A]].<ref name="CatCW" />

==Appearances==
*{{TCWComicCite|6.8|A Trooper's Tale}} {{Flash}}
